title: U.S. Military Death Toll in Iran War Rises to 6
summary_full: The number of U.S. service members killed in the first three days of the war grew as officials said the remains of two more troops had been recovered.
summary_public: The number of U.S. service members killed in the first three days of the war grew as officials said the remains of two more troops had been recovered.
